summary: Most frontend marketing-site structure is implemented (header nav with anchored sections, hero/about/services/contact, footer, theme + focus styles) and a backend contact submission/listing API exists. Key backend persistence requirements are not met (no stable storage across upgrades, no timestamp). Required generated image asset files cannot be confirmed from the diff summary (though they are referenced in the UI). Several unrequested admin/auth/access-control features and a caffeine.ai attribution link were added.

missing_requirements.requirement: Stored inquiries persist across canister upgrades using stable storage patterns; inquiries include a timestamp along with submitted fields.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend stores inquiries in an in-memory `Map` without any stable variables or `preupgrade`/`postupgrade` hooks, and the `ContactInquiry` type contains only `name`, `email`, and `message` (no timestamp).

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend exposes a method to create/store an inquiry with timestamp and submitted fields.
missing_requirements.reason: The submit method stores only `{ name; email; message }` and does not capture a timestamp.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generated images exist in `frontend/public/assets/generated` with the specified filenames.
missing_requirements.reason: The UI references the required filenames, but the diff summary does not show the actual image files being added under `frontend/public/assets/generated` (an added file is omitted due to limits), so existence cannot be verified from provided evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin-only access control and authorization mixins on the backend (admin checks, initialization, and additional admin-only query endpoints).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only asked for create and list inquiry endpoints for future admin use; it did not request implementing admin authorization, secret-token initialization, or an additional `getInquiry` endpoint.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity wiring and login context/provider for the app.
hallucinated_features.reason: Internet Identity was allowed but explicitly "not required for this marketing site"; the diff adds an InternetIdentityProvider and actor creation dependent on identity.

hallucinated_features.description: URL/session-based secret parameter utilities and use of a `caffeineAdminToken` query/hash parameter to initialize access control.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested in the BuildRequest and adds an admin-token mechanism beyond the stated requirements for a marketing contact form.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest required a footer with business name and tagline/essentials, but did not request third-party attribution or outbound marketing links with tracking parameters.
